steps.title: Identify the appositive
steps.content: The title Reclaim the Stars is followed by a noun phrase explaining what the work is: an anthology of fantasy and science fiction. That explanatory phrase is an appositive and should be set off with a comma, not split into a new sentence.

steps.title: Reject faulty punctuation
steps.content: A creates a sentence break before a fragment. B adds "while," which incorrectly makes the anthology description subordinate to another idea. C omits the needed punctuation between the title and the appositive. The answer is D.
